variants.title: Fleetguard AF25954 Cabin Air Filter Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P955635
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25954 panel cabin air filter provides clean air in the cab which means a clean work environment.  Breathing cleaner air can lead to longer and more productive working hours.

variants.title: Donaldson P955635 Air Filter, Panel
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P955635 Air Filter, Panel is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, panel applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
